words.def: emblem usually consisting of a rectangular piece of cloth of distinctive design

words.def: the act of slowing down or falling behind

words.def: United States liquid unit equal to 4 quarts or 3.785 liters
words.zh: [化] 伽(重力加速度單位,等於1釐米/秒,2)
